summary: Mock reverse-engineered spec for Legacy Insurance System.

business_rules.description: Age-based risk loading adjusts premium tiers.
Policy type adjustments alter discounts and endorsements.
GDPR consent required before data persistence for EU customers.

country_specific_rules.rule: Insurance tax surcharge applied to selected policy types.
Regional levy calculated for health-linked riders.
Stamp-duty adjustment included for qualifying policies.

validations.rule: Customer must be at least 18 years old.
Country must be supported for selected product line.

notes: Generated from local mock mode because no OpenAI API key was found.
